Retrofit Construction
about services projects resources

faq

construction project management

Construction project management involves planning, coordinating, and overseeing all aspects of a construction project from inception to completion. It encompasses tasks such as budgeting, scheduling, resource allocation, and communication to ensure projects are executed efficiently, on time, and within budget while maintaining quality and safety standards.

deep energy retrofits and extensions

Deep energy retrofits involve comprehensive and transformative upgrades to existing buildings, focusing on substantial energy savings and sustainability. They often include building envelope upgrades such as improved airtightness, enhanced insulation, high performance windows and doors, efficient HVAC systems and renewable energy integration. These measures significantly reduce energy consumption, enhance comfort and health for the occupant, and minimize environmental impact while maximizing a building's potential.

consultation

No matter what stage of the project, we offer consultancy services to contractors or homeowners. In the project development phase we help with assessing the retrofit potential of the project. In the design phase, we help with incorporating high performance details and material choices. In the construction phase we make sure things are getting properly executed and test for airtightness. At every project juncture, we provide tailored consultancy services for both contractors and homeowners. During project development, we evaluate retrofit potential. In the design phase, we seamlessly integrate high-performance details and material selections. Throughout construction, we meticulously oversee execution, ensuring precision and conducting airtightness testing for optimal outcomes.
